name: Salesforce.com
notes:
Our peering policy is selective, we have a minimum peak traffic requirement of 10Mbps with peer ASN to establish bilateral peering.

Salesforce.com will only send prefixes for a given continent/region to route servers and prefixes received via the route servers will not be propagated beyond the local continent/region. 

Please contact us for direct peering if you are interested in Salesforce.com global routing scope.

An accurate PeeringDB entry is required for direct peering.
